name: Google
syntax_guide: Use standard Google search operators: site:, inurl:, intitle:, filetype:, "exact phrase", | (OR), - (exclude)

name: GitHub
syntax_guide: Use GitHub code search syntax: repo:, user:, language:, path:, extension:, "exact string"

name: Shodan
syntax_guide: Use Shodan filters: port:, country:, city:, org:, os:, hostname:, product:, vuln:

name: Censys
syntax_guide: Use Censys search syntax: services.service_name:, location.country:, services.port:, labels:

name: X / Twitter
syntax_guide: Use X search operators: from:, to:, url:, lang:, min_replies:, has:media, has:links

name: LinkedIn
syntax_guide: Limited search syntax. Use keywords for people, companies, jobs, or content search.

name: Pastebin
syntax_guide: Basic keyword search. Use for finding leaked credentials and code snippets.

name: VirusTotal
syntax_guide: Use VT search syntax: entity:url, entity:domain, engine:, tag:, p:+

name: URLscan
syntax_guide: Use URLscan syntax: domain:, ip:, asn:, server:, page.domain:, page.mime:

name: FOFA
syntax_guide: Use FOFA syntax: title="", body="", server="", protocol="", port="", host="", country="CN"

name: grep.app
syntax_guide: Code search across public repos. Use regex patterns and plain text search.

name: PublicWWW
syntax_guide: Source code search engine. Use any string or regex to find code snippets.
